reviews.comment:
Linda estación, no esta señalizada la entrada a la misma, corrijan esto. Muchos pasan derecho y tienen que retomar x colectora. . el resto de la atención y KAS comodidades excelentes. Los playeros muy atentos

(Translated by Google)
Nice station, but the entrance isn't clearly marked; please fix this. Many drivers drive straight through and then have to turn around on the service road. Otherwise, the service and amenities are excellent. The attendants are very helpful.
